project.name: The Witness
project.local_vantage: subtle; do not overfocus on location
project.editorial_mandate: Maintain non-Western vantage point. Prevent US-centric tech feed bias. Weight regional and Global South voices equally with Western sources.

sources.title: The Pope isn’t AGI-pilled
